title: Copy-Cat Parrot
short_description: Pablo the Parrot shows off a dance — watch the moves light up, then copy them back in order. Each round adds one more move.
description: Pablo the Parrot LOVES to show off his dance moves! Watch the sequence light up, then copy it back in the exact same order — and each round he sneaks in one more move. It's a classic Simon-style workout for working memory and concentration, with cheerful sounds and a wiggling parrot. Grade bands ramp from four moves at a gentle pace, to a quicker four-move tempo, to six speedy moves for grade 4–5. A free online memory and concentration game for kids in grades 1–5, with every copied move feeding your score and GP.
controls: Watch the moves light up, then tap them in the same order. Sound optional.
